document.title: 의료기기 제조 및 품질관리 기준 적합인정서 (Certificate of GMP)
standards: Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices

sourceSummary.oneLine: KCL Certificate of GMP recognizing H&abyz compliance with medical device manufacturing and quality management standards for Physiological Monitoring Device product group.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Evidence of KGMP compliance recognition for the listed medical device product group and manufacturer facilities.
keyPoints: Applicant is (주)에이치앤아비즈 / H&abyz with license no. 제 4948 호.
Product group is 생체현상 측정기기 (Physiological Monitoring Device).
The certificate states compliance with Korea Good Manufacturing Practices of Medical Devices.
Changes and administrative measures list 정기심사 dated 2022-10-17.
